use_cases: Trigger form submissions with customizable variants for primary, secondary, and destructive actions
Provide navigation controls with link-styled button variants
Enable icon-only buttons for compact UI actions like close, delete, or settings
Create accessible interactive elements with keyboard navigation and focus ring support
Compose with child components using the asChild pattern for flexible composition
ai_summary: A reusable atomic Button component with CVA-powered variants for styling (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built on Radix UI Slot for composition, with native accessibility support including focus-visible states and keyboard navigation. Designed as a foundational UI building block for any React application.
